steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The critics praised the films as “picture-perfect” and “heartbreaking and inspiring,” and fans hope this ______ will draw audiences.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content: Acclaim—public praise—directly conveys what attracts new audiences to films. The others either contradict this (ambivalence and impartiality suggest doubt or neutrality) or describe something unrelated (foresight concerns prediction). That matches choice A — A is correct.
